:root {
  --mv-accent: #C84B3F;
  --mv-accent-dark: #A33A30;
  --mv-accent-ink: #6E2A22;
  --mv-accent-soft: #FBEDEB;
  --mv-ink: #0A0A0A;
  --mv-ink-2: #525252;
  --mv-ink-3: #9A9A9A;
  --mv-line: #E5E5E5;
  --mv-line-soft: #F0F0F0;
  --mv-surface: #FFFFFF;
  --mv-shell: #FAFAFA;
  --mv-font: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "Arimo", "Liberation Sans",
             Arial, sans-serif;
}

.sb-show-main, .docs-story, .sbdocs.sbdocs-wrapper,
.sbdocs.sbdocs-content {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

/* Hero — red block, reverse-out display type, asterisk mark.
   The Swiss-poster move: a single saturated red rectangle does the
   visual lifting, type lands big and white over it. */
.mv-hero {
  position: relative;
  padding: 64px 56px 56px;
  margin-bottom: 64px;
  background: var(--mv-accent);
  color: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 2px;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
}
.mv-hero-meta {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #ffffff;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}
.mv-hero-bullet {
  color: #ffffff;
  margin-right: 10px;
  font-size: 10px;
}
.mv-hero-meta-right {
  margin-left: auto;
  color: #ffffff;
  opacity: 0.85;
  font-weight: 400;
}
.mv-title {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: clamp(56px, 9vw, 96px);
  line-height: 0.95;
  margin: 0 0 24px;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.mv-tagline {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  max-width: 640px;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.55;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #ffffff;
  margin: 0 0 36px;
}
.mv-cta {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mv-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 12px 22px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.005em;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.14s ease, color 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease;
}
.mv-btn-primary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--mv-accent) !important;
  border: 1px solid #ffffff;
}
.mv-btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--mv-ink);
  color: #ffffff !important;
  border-color: var(--mv-ink);
}
.mv-btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
}
.mv-btn-ghost:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  border-color: #ffffff;
}

.mv-section-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.mv-section-head .mv-h2 { margin: 0; }

.mv-h2 {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 28px;
  color: var(--mv-ink);
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.mv-h3 {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 14px;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  color: var(--mv-ink);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: -0.005em;
}
.mv-lead {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  color: var(--mv-ink-2);
  margin: 0 0 28px;
  max-width: 680px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.mv-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 64px;
}
.mv-card {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  padding: 22px 22px 48px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid var(--mv-line);
  background: var(--mv-surface);
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: border-color 0.14s ease, transform 0.14s ease;
  min-height: 138px;
}
.mv-card-bullet {
  display: block;
  color: var(--mv-accent);
  font-size: 8px;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  transition: transform 0.14s ease;
}
.mv-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--mv-ink);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.mv-card:hover .mv-card-bullet { transform: scale(1.5); }
.mv-card-title {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  color: var(--mv-ink) !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.015em;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.mv-card-text {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: var(--mv-ink-2);
  margin: 0;
}
.mv-card-arrow {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 18px;
  right: 18px;
  color: var(--mv-accent);
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-4px);
  transition: opacity 0.14s ease, transform 0.14s ease;
}
.mv-card:hover .mv-card-arrow {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateX(0);
}

.mv-cols {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 32px;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.mv-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.mv-col p {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  color: var(--mv-ink-2);
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.mv-note {
  margin: 12px 0 64px;
  padding: 22px 24px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background: var(--mv-accent-soft);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--mv-accent);
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--mv-ink);
}
.mv-note code {
  background: var(--mv-surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--mv-line);
  padding: 1px 6px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-size: 12.5px;
}

/* MDX bare-code & inline-code on this page, so they match the page font. */
.sbdocs .mv-hero ~ * code,
.sbdocs .mv-cols code { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; }

@media screen and (max-width: 860px) {
  .mv-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .mv-cols { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .mv-title { font-size: 48px; }
  .mv-hero { padding: 40px 28px 36px; }
  .mv-hero .mv-hero-meta-right { display: none; }
}
`
    })]
